personality_one_liner: A structured, highly readable, utility-driven directory focusing on clear imagery and intuitive actions.

spacing.rule: Generous outer padding (lg/xl) with tight coupling inside cards (gap: 0 between image and text area per constraints).

do's: Use blur on the sticky header of the detail screen when scrolling.
Use blur on the back button container if placed over the hero image.
dont's: Do not use blur on hotel cards or list items.

screens.name: Ana Sayfa
screens.purpose: A vertical scrolling list of hotels functioning purely as a directory.
screens.layout: Vertical list (FlatList). Card Layout: A single parent container with overflow: 'hidden' and borderRadius: 'md'. Inside the card: Top element is an Image (width: '100%', height: 200). Bottom element is a View (backgroundColor: 'surfaceSecondary', padding: 'lg') containing the Hotel Name text. CRITICAL constraint: No margin or gap between the image and the text area. They must be flush and strictly attached ('yapışık'). Background of the screen is 'surface' (#F2F2F7) so the white cards pop. Use shadow tier 1 on the cards.

screens.name: Otel Detayı
screens.purpose: Show the hotel hero image and provide 3 prominent contact action buttons.
screens.layout: Scrollable page. Top section: Hero Image (height: 300) with a gradient scrim at the top for the Back button readability. Middle section: Hotel Name in large typography ('2xl') with padding 'lg'. Bottom section: A vertical stack of 3 large, full-width touchable buttons (Konum, Telefon, E-posta). Each button should have a solid 'brandTertiary' background, 'onBrandTertiary' text, a leading icon, a tall hit area (height: 56pt), and 'md' border radius. Ensure the buttons use Linking API correctly (Google Maps intent, tel:, mailto:).

hotel_exterior_1.alt: A large hotel building with blue shutters

hotel_room_1.alt: Modern hotel room with white bed

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI entirely in Turkish as requested.

Implement the hotel cards precisely with NO gap between the image and the text box. The text box must be flush against the bottom of the image inside an overflow-hidden card to satisfy the 'kutuya yapışık, taşmayacak' constraint.
Do NOT include any booking logic, date pickers, or pricing. This is strictly an information directory.
Use the exact Booking.com colors provided (#003580 and #0071C2) as the brand colors. Do not replace them with generic grays.

For the 3 large action buttons in the Detail screen (Konum, Telefon, E-posta), implement `Linking.openURL` handlers. For location, map to a Google Maps search URL (e.g., `https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Otel+Ismi`).
Keep typography scalable and weight max capped at 500.
Make the 3 action buttons chunky and easy to tap (min 56pt height), using brandTertiary (#E6F0F9) background and brandPrimary (#003580) icon/text for strong visual clarity.
